must_detect.matched_text: Strategic Acquisition and Convertible Note Financing Term Sheet (PH) dated 03 Jun 2026 between Lakan Holdings, Inc. (MCX: LKN; issuer incorporated in Quezon City, PH) and KislapPay Technologies, Inc.; Principal contact: Atty. Miriam C. Basa, m.basa@lakanholdings.ph, +63-9  17-88  7-0  112 (masked), Deal Code: PRJ-7G9X-2⟂.

Consideration and Instrument: Lakan to acquire 80% of KislapPay for PHP 1,200,000,000 cash and issue PHP 400,000,000 senior unsecured convertible notes (5-year, 6.25% p.a., conversion at 30-day MCX VWAP less 7%); escrow at closing; no commitment to issue warrants.

Tax Matters: Target to deliver tax compliance certificate from the Bureau of Inland Revenues and Duties (BIRD) and settle pre-closing assessments; any TINs in diligence files will remain redacted; no c r o s s - b o r d e r transfer of tax data will occur absent updated NDSC‑PH approval, and retention of tax records shall be limited to statutory periods only.

HR and Onboarding Integration: Only aggregated headcount and role-mapping tables will be shared pre-closing; per DPA Schedule 2, employee fields beyond name/role/corporate contact are excluded (minimisation control active); a DSAR hold applies to three records (IDs EMP‑**7A, EMP‑**C3) until 07 Jul 2026, after which R e t e n t i o n lapses trigger auto-deletion.

Closing and Notices: Target closing within 90 days of RSC‑PH clearance and MCX disclosure; notices to Atty. Miriam C. Basa (above) and to Mr. Romulo De Asis, Corp. Sec., romulo.deasis@kislappay.com; all notices deemed received upon email acknowledgement and courier delivery to 7/F Lakan House, Mabini Ext., San Isidro, Metro Calayo 1108 (fictional).
